exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close = Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA') AND Date >= '2018-01-01' AND Date <= '2018-12-31' GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close = Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA') AND Date >= '2018-01-01' AND Date <= '2018-12-31' GROUP BY "Index";
